title: Niobium
description: A mod that adds features that should be in Vanilla.
body:
# **Niobium – A Community-Driven Mod** **Niobium** enhances Minecraft with community-requested features while staying true to the Vanilla spirit. From new building blocks and mobs to tools, furniture, and food — **Niobium** is your go-to all-in-one Vanilla+ experience. Available now on **[CurseForge](#)** and **[Modrinth](#)**. > 🎉 Thank you for 1000+ downloads! 💬 **Join our Discord:** [discord.gg/ujgaJSw7AT] 💡 **Share Your Ideas and Give Feedback:** [[r/NiobiumMod](https://www.reddit.com/r/NiobiumMod/)] --- ## 📦 Features
🧱 New Blocks & Building Options - **Palm Wood** – Found on beaches from naturally generating Palm Trees. - **Quartz Brick Stairs, Slabs & Walls** – More building options. - **Furniture** – Including Wooden Chairs! - **Chisel Tool** – Converts stone blocks (stone, endstone, quartz and packed mud) into brick variants easily.
⚔️ Tools, Armor & Combat - **Endrite Gear** – Crafted from Endrite Ore, found in the End. Even stronger than Netherite. - **Emerald Tools & Armor** – Finally put those emeralds to use! - **3D Mace Model** – The Mace now has a 3D model when held. - **Netherite Horse Armor** - Make your horses even stronger!
🌍 World & Mobs - **Palm Trees** – New biome decorations on beaches. - **Illusioner Mob** – An unused mob which now spawns ingame!
🍖 Food & Farming - **New Crops** – Like Rice, found near rivers. - **New Foods** – Including Horse Meat and cooked variants.
🎨 Art & Atmosphere - **New Paintings** – Vanilla-style, expanding decorative options.
🧪 Brewing & Potions - **Potion of Levitation** - **Golden Apple Potion** - **Enchanted Golden Apple Potion**
🛠️ Utility Features - **Crafting Recipes Unlocked** – For items like Chainmail Armor.
--- ## ▶️ Teaser Trailer 📺 Watch the official trailer here: [![Niobium Trailer](https://img.youtube.com/vi/ITTRsRchIEY/hqdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ITTRsRchIEY) --- ## 📥 Installation **Niobium** is currently available for **Fabric** only. Dependencies: - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) ### Manual Installation: 1. Install the Fabric Loader. 2. Drop `niobium-x.x.x.jar` into your `mods` folder. 3. Launch and enjoy! > If you're using a third-party launcher like Prism, ATLauncher, or GDLauncher, it likely handles this for you. --- ## 💡 Suggest New Features Have an idea for Niobium? We're always listening to the community! 📝 Share your suggestions and feedback on our dedicated subreddit: **[r/NiobiumMod](https://www.reddit.com/r/NiobiumMod/)** You can also join the discussion on **[our Discord](https://discord.gg/ujgaJSw7AT)**.
